query:
INSERT INTO service_disclaimers (disclaimer_type, title, short_text, full_text, requires_acknowledgment, display_on_documents, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('tax_disclaimer', 'Tax Services Disclaimer', 
'Tax preparation services provided are for document preparation only and do not constitute tax advice.',
'DISCLAIMER: The tax preparation services provided by L.A.W.S. Collective are limited to document preparation and filing assistance only. These services DO NOT constitute tax advice, tax planning, or professional tax consultation. Users should consult with a licensed Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Enrolled Agent (EA), or qualified tax professional for tax decisions, tax planning strategies, and interpretation of tax laws. L.A.W.S. Collective is not responsible for any tax decisions made based on documents prepared through this service. By using this service, you acknowledge that you understand this limitation and agree to seek professional tax advice for all tax-related decisions.',
TRUE, TRUE, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('legal_disclaimer', 'Legal Services Disclaimer',
'Document services provided do not constitute legal advice. Consult a licensed attorney.',
'DISCLAIMER: The document preparation and contract services provided by L.A.W.S. Collective are for informational and administrative purposes only. These services DO NOT constitute legal advice, legal representation, or the practice of law. Documents provided are templates and should be reviewed by a licensed attorney before execution. L.A.W.S. Collective is not a law firm and does not provide legal counsel. Users should consult with a licensed attorney in their jurisdiction for legal advice, interpretation of laws, and legal decisions. By using this service, you acknowledge that you understand this limitation and agree to seek professional legal counsel for all legal matters.',
TRUE, TRUE, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('financial_disclaimer', 'Financial Services Disclaimer',
'Bookkeeping services do not constitute financial or investment advice.',
'DISCLAIMER: The bookkeeping and business management services provided by L.A.W.S. Collective are limited to record-keeping, transaction recording, and report generation only. These services DO NOT constitute financial advice, investment advice, or professional financial planning. Users should consult with a licensed Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Certified Financial Planner (CFP), or qualified financial professional for financial decisions, investment strategies, and financial planning. L.A.W.S. Collective is not responsible for any financial decisions made based on reports or records prepared through this service. By using this service, you acknowledge that you understand this limitation and agree to seek professional financial advice for all financial decisions.',
TRUE, TRUE, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('health_disclaimer', 'Health Services Disclaimer',
'Wellness services do not constitute medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional.',
'DISCLAIMER: The wellness and health coordination services provided by L.A.W.S. Collective are for general wellness education and coordination purposes only. These services DO NOT constitute medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or professional healthcare services. Users should consult with a licensed physician, healthcare provider, or qualified medical professional for medical advice, diagnosis, and treatment of health conditions. L.A.W.S. Collective is not a healthcare provider and does not provide medical services. By using this service, you acknowledge that you understand this limitation and agree to seek professional medical advice for all health-related decisions.',
TRUE, TRUE, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
